creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
That's because you're missing polkit agent running in the background.

You can install polkit-gnome package, then go to cinnamon control center, then to startup applications. Add new command /usr/local/libexec/polkit-gnome-authentication-agent-1 to it.
Relogin.

I'll try to include this to cinnamon installation or provide proper instruction for this in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=281737
